reason: The text contains explicit commands for the Israelites to remain confined and obey instructions. The Passover instructions specifically command: 'And you shall not go out, each man from the door of his house until morning' (וְאַתֶּ֗ם לֹ֥א תֵצְא֛וּ אִ֥ישׁ מִפֶּֽתַח־ בֵּית֖וֹ עַד־ בֹּֽקֶר). Subsequently, the text confirms that 'the sons of Israel went and did as the Lord commanded Moses and Aaron' (וַיֵּלְכ֥וּ וַיַּֽעֲשׂ֖וּ בְּנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל כַּאֲשֶׁ֨ר צִוָּ֧ה יְהוָ֛ה). The statement captures the essence of this passage: the people are called to remain confined (shut up) and to obey the prescribed instructions (follow).
